subject: [PATCH 0/7 v3] mm/memcontrol, page_counter: move stock from mem_cgroup to page_counter

reviews.author: Sashiko
reviews.summary: Identified a potential double-uncharge issue when draining stock in disable_stock. Suggested reordering the callsite to prevent racy charges and ensure correct behavior.

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch series moves the per-cpu stock from mem_cgroup to page_counter, consolidating stock limit checking and page_counter limit checking into page_counter_try_charge. This eliminates the 7-memcg-per-cpu slot limit, random evictions (drain & refill), and slot traversal. The resulting code in memcg is also easier to follow, as the caching becomes transparent from memcg's perspective and managed entirely within page_counter.
